# 容量模型 (capacity_model)

> 给定 DAU + 保留期 → veFaaS 实例 / TOS GB / NAS / SQLite 是否需迁 Postgres

## 1. 关键拐点常量

| 常量 | 值 |
| --- | --- |
| sqlite_lock_threshold_writers | 200 |
| workers_per_vefaas_instance | 3 |
| vefaas_instance_ram_gb | 2 |

## 2. 四档容量场景

| 场景 | DAU | 日项目数 | 日分钟数 | 并发写 | TOS GB | NAS GB | veFaaS 实例 | DB 推荐 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| v10_pilot | 1,000 | 200 | 2,400 | 40 | 4,042.5 | 19.36 | 66 | SQLite |
| v10_launch | 10,000 | 3,000 | 36,000 | 400 | 60,638.1 | 290.4 | 988 | Postgres ≥ 14 (managed: 火山 RDS / Neon / Supabase) |
| v10_scale | 100,000 | 25,000 | 300,000 | 4,000 | 505,317.9 | 2,420.4 | 8,231 | Postgres ≥ 14 (managed: 火山 RDS / Neon / Supabase) |
| v10_peak | 500,000 | 100,000 | 1,200,000 | 20,000 | 2,021,271.5 | 9,681.7 | 32,922 | Postgres ≥ 14 (managed: 火山 RDS / Neon / Supabase) |
